title: The Peanut Butter Heist
description: Barnaby's owner locked a brand new jar of peanut butter inside a wooden pantry cabinet 4 feet off the ground.
goal: Get the peanut butter jar down onto the floor and open it!
heroPrompt: A vibrant Pixar 3D animation style scene of a cute short-legged Corgi named Barnaby looking up at a high wooden pantry cabinet in a cozy kitchen, 3D render, warm lighting, no text

initialItems.name: 4ft Pantry Cabinet
initialItems.desc: Mounted high above counter with magnetic latch

title: Operation Early Friday
description: Arthur desperately wants to sneak out of the office at 3:15 PM on a sunny Friday without his micromanaging boss catching him.
goal: Escape the office building with your backpack without Mr. Henderson spotting you!

title: The Zero-G Toaster Dilemma
description: Gloop discovered an Earth kitchen appliance (a pop-up toaster) on a abandoned space station and thinks it is a sacred energy reactor.
goal: Toast a slice of bread inside the toaster without getting zapped or triggering zero-gravity floating bread chaos!
heroPrompt: A funny Pixar 3D animation style scene of a cute green alien staring intently at a chrome kitchen toaster on a spaceship, 3D render, no text
